title: NOCTURNE Studios: Welcome
message: You have enabled Push Notifications for Prism, you can now receive notifications outside Prism while it is open.

title: Prism: Update
message: Update complete. You are now running on the latest version of Prism.

title: Prism: Update
message: Update process cancelled. Prompt was closed, you can update Prism anytime at Settings > Update or Recache Prism.

title: Prism: Missing Assets
message: Your current assets haven't fully loaded, this is because you picked 'Prism Only' when you updated Prism. For the full experience, choose 'Full Download' in Settings > Update or Recache Prism > Full Download.
